title: RRule Service
description: Service for working with RRule recurrence patterns. Provides methods to create RRule instances from options or strings, convert between formats, and query occurrences.

types.title: AXRruleService
types.description: Service for managing RRule recurrence patterns and generating date sequences.

methods.name: rruleFromOptions
methods.content:
/**
 * Creates an RRule instance from options object.
 */
async rruleFromOptions(options: Partial<AXROptionsType>): Promise<AXRRuleType>
methods.description: Creates an RRule instance from options object

methods.name: rruleFromString
methods.content:
/**
 * Creates an RRule instance from a RRULE string.
 */
async rruleFromString(ruleString: string): Promise<AXRRuleType>
methods.description: Creates an RRule instance from a RRULE string

methods.name: rruleFromText
methods.content:
/**
 * Creates an RRule instance from human-readable text.
 */
async rruleFromText(ruleText: string): Promise<AXRRuleType>
methods.description: Creates an RRule instance from human-readable text

methods.name: rruleToOptions
methods.content:
/**
 * Extracts options from an RRule instance.
 */
rruleToOptions(rule: AXRRuleType): AXParsedOptionsType
methods.description: Extracts options from an RRule instance

methods.name: rruleToString
methods.content:
/**
 * Converts an RRule instance to RRULE string format.
 */
rruleToString(rule: AXRRuleType): string
methods.description: Converts an RRule instance to RRULE string format

methods.name: rruleToText
methods.content:
/**
 * Converts an RRule instance to human-readable text.
 */
rruleToText(rule: AXRRuleType): string
methods.description: Converts an RRule instance to human-readable text

methods.name: rruleGetAll
methods.content:
/**
 * Gets all occurrences of the rule up to a limit.
 */
rruleGetAll(rule: AXRRuleType, limit?: number): Date[]
methods.description: Gets all occurrences of the rule up to a limit

methods.name: rruleGetBetween
methods.content:
/**
 * Gets occurrences between two dates.
 */
rruleGetBetween(rule: AXRRuleType, after: Date, before: Date, inclusive?: boolean): Date[]

methods.name: rruleGetBefore
methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the last occurrence before the specified date.
 */
rruleGetBefore(rule: AXRRuleType, date: Date, inclusive?: boolean): Date | null
methods.description: Gets the last occurrence before the specified date

methods.name: rruleGetAfter
methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the first occurrence after the specified date.
 */
rruleGetAfter(rule: AXRRuleType, date: Date, inclusive?: boolean): Date | null
methods.description: Gets the first occurrence after the specified date
